calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-03-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioner: Rachel Monique Botamino Cusigch, not present, appearance waived.
The Minor's father: , present in pro per for the minor: Adrian A. Cusigch, signed the petition in open court, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Adrian A. Cusigch Botamino.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-25-2004 Reset To Jun-03-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Sara Lerschen

Petitioner: Rachel Monique Botamino Cusigch, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
There are two names on the petition.

The petition is granted as to the mother only, and the name is changed to: Rachel Monique Botamino,
Decree signed in open court.

As to the petition for the minor Adrian Cusigch, the matter is continued to: Thursday, June 3, 2004 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 218 for the minor's father to appear in court and sign the petition.
